description: As an HMIS administrator, configure a new classification for Emergency Obstetric Care (EmOC) in DHIS2. Create three Organisation Unit Groups: 'CEmOC Facilities' (Short name: 'CEmOC'), 'BEmOC Facilities' (Short name: 'BEmOC'), and 'Non-EmOC Facilities' (Short name: 'Non-EmOC'). Assign 'Bo Government Hospital' and 'Kenema Government Hospital' to the 'CEmOC Facilities' group; 'Bandajuma Sowa CHC' and 'Mattru Jong CHC' to the 'BEmOC Facilities' group; and 'Ngelehun CHC' and 'Baoma CHC' to the 'Non-EmOC Facilities' group. Create a new compulsory data dimension Organisation Unit Group Set named 'EmOC Capability Level' (Short name: 'EmOC Level') and include the three created groups as members.
